title: peliosanthes teta
intro: Peliosanthes teta, also known as the Himalayan grapevine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peliosanthes teta include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
